title: "We Ought To Listen Up - Part 1" Hebrews 2:1-4

notes.introduction: An exposition of Hebrews 2:1-4 on the obligation to give earnest heed to the Word of God, set within the broader context of Hebrews 1 and the superiority of Christ. Part one of a two-part study in a Wednesday evening series titled 'Doing What We Ought to Do,' focusing on the danger of neglecting to hear and obey Scripture.

sections.heading: Series and Book of Hebrews Introduced
